_comment: M6-B2DE4 §8 — the ONE set of identifier vectors. The Rust validator (sync_policy::is_valid_sync_identifier) and the TypeScript validator (apply-change.ts isValidSyncIdentifier) are BOTH run over this file and must agree on every entry. A SEMANTIC drift test, not a textual one. Raw control characters (newline/tab/NUL) are proven behaviorally in the m6b2de4 apply gate and the Rust matrix, not carried in this JSON.
